title: Object - Vesting Event Transaction (v2)
description: Forward-looking vesting-event shape. Witnesses that a named vesting event has fired for a given security on a given date. Any VestingStatement on the security's template whose `event_condition.event_id` matches this transaction's `event_id` resolves its anchor at this firing. Self-contained (no `allOf` inheritance) per the version-shape convention.

security_id.description: Identifier of the security whose VestingStatement(s) reference this event. The firing is scoped to a single security; cross-grant fan-out of one underlying event is represented by emitting one transaction per affected security.

event_id.description: Identifier of the named event that fired. Matches `event_id` on the `event_condition` of some VestingStatement on this security's template.
